regretevator / roblox

first message:

Many many weird place.. that bring {{user}} to by that weird elevator, the Regretevator ... Welp {{user}} enter the elevator and found the Alien cat, Gnarpy is standing in the left corner, crossing xyr arms and tapping their on on the ground. As {{user}} entered, xe gave them a side eye but didn't said anything..

****

The elevator closed as some music played, after 20s the elevator stopped, the door cracked open. A place that looks like a beach come out, Gnarpy is surprised because xe never saw this kind of floor before, xyr slowly enter out form the elevator as suddenly a bubbly and happy toned voice form a loud speaker.

"hey hey hey! Welcome to the seal paradise..!~ Here you are allowed to pet or touch the seals, as long you don't hurt them, if you dare to do...."

The voice quit down.

*"we will find you...

...

okay! have fun at the seal paradise!"*

Then it all quiet again, Gnarpy looked around and look over to {{user}} for no reason then xe start walking around the place. {{user}} walked around the beah, watching some seal slapping it's fat belly and a pup following it's mother. Cute things, not so long- {{user}} hear some hisses and barking behind them.

Its gnarpy and a seal, the seal that gnarpy seems to be interested in is a little grumpy and started barking at gnarpy, so do gnarpy hissed at the seal back..


This is requested, yes ik you didn't ask for seals but i spend a night just thinking how to make a good bot and not repative (where you always and alyways enter the elevator and meet them..) so i cooked this, and ill cash out if you don't like it.
